about.title: About Concordia
about.quote: Good food brings people together — that is what Concordia has always been about.
about.p1: Concordia is a family-run Italian restaurant in Kempen. For us, harmony is not just a name — it is how we welcome guests, how we work together in the kitchen, and how every plate leaves our pass.
about.p2: We opened our doors on Concordienplatz with a simple idea: honest Italian cooking, generous portions, and the feeling that you are eating at someone's table — not in a chain.
about.p3: Today you can visit us in person or order online. Either way, the same team prepares your meal fresh when you order. No reheating, no shortcuts — just the food we are proud to serve our neighbours and families.
about.originText: Kempen is home. Our guests know us from birthdays, Friday pizza nights, and quiet lunches on the square. That trust means everything — and it is why we treat every online order with the same care as a table by the window.

fresh.title: Fresh, always
fresh.text: Prepared when you order — not sitting under a heat lamp.

family.title: Family table
family.text: A small team that knows many guests by name.

care.title: Every order matters
care.text: Pickup, delivery or dine-in — same pride on the plate.

about.kitchenTitle: From our oven to your table
about.kitchenText: Pizza, pasta, salads, al forno dishes, schnitzel, burgers and more — cooked fresh for pickup or delivery.
about.kitchenCta: Choose your branch and order now — pickup or delivery.

r1.text: The best pizza in the area — always fresh, always friendly. We order every week.
r1.author: Sandra M., Kempen

r2.text: Fast delivery, hot food, fair prices. The pasta is fantastic.
r2.author: Thomas K., Willich

r3.text: You can taste the passion. Our family loves Concordia.
r3.author: Elena R., Tönisvorst

r4.text: Great online ordering — easy to customise and the 10% discount is a nice bonus.
r4.author: Markus B., Kempen

r5.text: Warm welcome, generous portions, true Italian flavour. Highly recommended.
r5.author: Julia H., Straelen

offers.title: Offers & promotions
offers.lead: Order directly on our website and enjoy rewards built in — no codes, no fuss.
offers.discountText: Order through our website and receive 10% off automatically at checkout. No voucher code needed.
offers.drinkText: Orders from €35 include a complimentary soft drink — our thank-you for choosing Concordia.
offers.step1Text: Choose Kempen and browse the full menu with photos and options.
offers.step2Text: Your 10% website discount and free drink (from €35) apply automatically.
offers.step3Text: Pay cash on pickup or delivery — we prepare everything fresh for you.
offers.promoNote: Hungry? Your table — or your doorstep — is just a few clicks away.
offers.giftText: Treat someone to Concordia — choose €10, €20, €30 or any amount. The code works only at the branch where you buy it (online or in person).

delivery.title: Delivery & pickup
delivery.lead: We deliver to selected postcodes around Kempen. Minimum order and delivery fee depend on your area.
delivery.pickupText: Prefer to collect? Order online and pick up at Concordienplatz 1, Kempen — we'll have it ready for you.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: Quick answers about ordering, payment and delivery.

q1.q: How do I place an order?
q1.a: Choose your branch on the homepage, browse the menu, customise your dishes and checkout online.

q2.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
q2.a: We currently accept cash on pickup and cash on delivery.

q3.a: Yes — at checkout you can choose ASAP or a scheduled time slot where available.

q4.q: How does the 10% online discount work?
q4.a: It is applied automatically when you order through our website. No code is required.

q5.a: Yes — after placing a delivery order you receive a tracking link to follow your driver on the map.

q6.a: Concordia Straelen is coming soon. You'll see it in our branch list as soon as ordering goes live.

q7.q: Where can I find legal information?
q7.a: Legal notice (Impressum), privacy policy and general terms are linked in the footer under Legal. Website order and loyalty terms are on Terms & loyalty.

faq.legalLead: Impressum, privacy policy and terms — carried over from our previous online shop.

impressum.title: Legal notice (Impressum)
impressum.lead: Mandatory provider information for Pizzeria Concordia in Kempen, Germany.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.lead: How we process personal data on the Concordia website.

agb.title: General terms and conditions (AGB)
agb.lead: Terms for online food orders at Pizzeria Concordia (from the previous Speisebaron shop, adapted for this website).
agb.loyaltyNote: The loyalty programme is governed additionally on <termsLink>Terms & loyalty</termsLink>.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.lead: These terms govern online orders on the Concordia website and the loyalty programme.

operator.title: 1. Operator and scope
operator.body: The website and online ordering system are operated by Concordia Restaurant (family-run), Concordienplatz 1, 47906 Kempen, Germany. These terms apply to all orders placed through our website and related services such as pickup, delivery, gift vouchers, and the loyalty programme, unless expressly agreed otherwise. Conflicting customer terms are not accepted unless we expressly agree to them in writing.

ordering.title: 2. Contract formation and order process
ordering.body: Menu items displayed on our website do not constitute a binding offer but an invitation to order. By submitting an order, you make a binding offer to purchase the selected items. The contract is formed when we accept your order by email or order confirmation in the system. We may refuse orders in cases of obvious errors, technical failures, capacity constraints, or suspected misuse.

prices.title: 3. Prices, payment, and website discount
prices.body: All prices are shown in euros and include statutory VAT unless stated otherwise. Additional costs (e.g. delivery fees) are displayed transparently before checkout. Eligible online orders through our website may receive a 10% website discount when active at the time of order and subject to the applicable promotion terms. Discounts, vouchers, and loyalty benefits are generally not combinable unless expressly stated.

delivery.title: 4. Pickup, delivery, and timing
delivery.body: You may place orders for pickup at the restaurant or delivery within our published delivery areas. Displayed times are estimates and may vary due to demand, weather, or traffic. For pickup, we are responsible for availability at the agreed time; for delivery, we deliver to your door provided access details and address information are correct. Please check your order promptly on receipt and report obvious issues without delay.

cancellation.title: 5. Cancellation, changes, and withdrawal
cancellation.body: Short-notice cancellations or changes are only possible while preparation has not yet started. Contact us immediately by phone or via the channels stated in your order confirmation. Where cancellation or withdrawal is justified, we refund payments for services not provided. Statutory withdrawal rights for distance contracts remain unaffected where applicable; exceptions may apply to perishable food.

promotions.title: 6. Promotions, vouchers, and marketing
promotions.body: Promotional offers, discount codes, gift vouchers, and loyalty benefits are subject to published terms, validity periods, and availability. Vouchers are generally not redeemable for cash and may only be used up to their stated value. By voluntarily opting in to marketing communications (e.g. newsletter), you consent to receive information about offers and news; you may withdraw consent at any time.

liability.title: 7. Liability
liability.body: We are fully liable for intent and gross negligence and for injury to life, body, or health. For slight negligence in breach of essential contractual obligations, liability is limited to foreseeable, typical contract damage. Further liability is excluded to the extent permitted by law. We are not liable for disruptions outside our control (e.g. force majeure, failure of payment or communication systems).

privacy.title: 8. Privacy
privacy.body: Details are in our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>. You may place orders without marketing consent.

law.title: 9. Governing law and jurisdiction
law.body: German law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG), subject to mandatory consumer protection rules of the country where the consumer habitually resides. If the customer is a merchant, legal entity under public law, or special fund under public law, Kempen shall be the exclusive place of jurisdiction for all disputes where permitted by law.

terms.contact: Questions about these terms: contact us via our contact page (/contact) or visit the restaurant at Concordienplatz 1, Kempen.
terms.loyaltyPartLead: The following terms apply additionally to our free loyalty programme.

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.body: The Concordia loyalty programme rewards repeat orders with points, tier benefits, and selected promotions. Participation requires a customer account. The programme is operated by Concordia Restaurant, Concordienplatz 1, 47906 Kempen, and may be adjusted or discontinued at any time where permitted by law.

membership.title: 2. Membership and account
membership.body: Participation requires a personal customer account with accurate contact details. You must keep your information up to date. Accounts are non-transferable. We may suspend or delete accounts for breaches of these terms, suspected fraud, or prolonged inactivity.

points.title: 3. Points and redemption
points.body: Points are credited for qualifying orders according to current programme rules, typically after an order is completed and paid. Unused points may expire if stated in programme notices. Points have no cash value and are non-transferable unless expressly stated otherwise.

tiers.title: 4. Tiers and benefits
tiers.body: Depending on your activity, you may reach loyalty tiers with additional benefits. Tiers, thresholds, and benefits are shown in the app or on the website and may be updated. Entitlement to specific benefits exists only within the active programme rules.

birthday.title: 5. Birthday benefit
birthday.body: As a birthday benefit, we offer a discount with code BIRTHDAY once per calendar year. Valid photo ID must be shown at pickup or delivery; the date of birth must match the date stored in your account. Fraud or abuse may result in refusal of the benefit. The birthday discount is not combinable with other offers unless expressly stated.

promotions.title: 6. Loyalty promotions
promotions.body: Additional loyalty promotions, bonus points, or limited-time offers may be published and are subject to their specific terms. Website discounts, vouchers, and loyalty benefits are generally not combinable unless expressly stated. Gift vouchers and marketing offers remain governed by the general Terms of Service.

misuse.title: 7. Misuse and sanctions
misuse.body: Account manipulation, multiple accounts for the same person, false identity details, or attempts to obtain points or discounts unlawfully are prohibited. We may revoke points, block benefits, refuse orders, and permanently close accounts for violations. Benefits already granted may be reclaimed where permitted by law.

changes.title: 8. Changes and termination
changes.body: We may change these programme terms, point rules, tiers, and benefits with future effect. Material changes will be communicated via the website or email where possible. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance unless an opt-out is offered. The programme may be discontinued entirely; any remaining points will be handled under the rules then in force.
